decoding.suffix: Answer with one number do not add any further explanations.

reproduction_command: source tau_env.sh && python scripts/run_search.py --task counting --model-alias qwen2_5_vl_3b_instruct --direction word-minus-digit --counting-language pooled_en_zh --windows 32-35 --sigmas 3.5 --component-modes mlp_attn --batch-size 128 --max-new-tokens 16 --qwen-max-pixels 401408 --no-run-baseline
full_sweep_command: source tau_env.sh && python scripts/run_search.py --task counting --model-alias qwen2_5_vl_3b_instruct --direction word-minus-digit --counting-language pooled_en_zh --windows 32-35 --sigmas 2.5,3,3.5,4,4.5,5,5.5 --component-modes mlp_attn --batch-size 128 --max-new-tokens 16 --qwen-max-pixels 401408 --no-run-baseline
